analysis: That night starting just before 1am — no bedtime, just chaos, and you still only clocked about 4 hours before 5am, which is rough even by winter standards. The bright spot is the 14 June evening block: you were down by 9:14pm, hit over 30 minutes of deep sleep, and that is your 8:30pm target energy actually showing up in the data. One deep sleep pocket doesn't fix a fragmented week, but it tells you the system works when you actually use it. Get yourself horizontal before midnight, babe — the protocol is good, it just needs a body in the bed to do its job.
